code: import api from"./axios";export const addVehicle=formData=>api.post("/vehicles",formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});export const updateVehicle=(id,formData)=>api.put("/vehicles/".concat(id),formData,{headers:{"Content-Type":"multipart/form-data"}});export const deleteVehicleImage=(vehicleId,filename)=>api.delete("/vehicles/".concat(vehicleId,"/images/").concat(encodeURIComponent(filename)));export const getVehicles=()=>api.get("/vehicles");export const getVehicleById=id=>api.get("/vehicles/".concat(id));export const deleteVehicle=id=>api.delete("/vehicles/".concat(id));
